$comment: Historical sha256 hashes of bundled body templates. Used by projectDoctor for safe pristine-file auto-refresh. Every release that changes a bundled template prepends its PREVIOUS hash to the file's 'historical' list. Doctor: if local hash == any historical, file is pristine-outdated (safe auto-replace); if not in historical AND != current, file is user-edited (prompt for merge/doctor). Current hashes are computed at runtime from bundled source, NOT stored here.

historical.note: Pre-cache-economics-backport. Had duplicated {{protocol_summaries}} / {{muscle_digests}} / {{scripts_table}} interpolation that compileFrontalCortex already prepends. Slot order unoptimized (core_rules first, volatile slots mid-template).
Pre-v0.21.2 bundled. Missing Prior Preloads + Kanban Snapshot sections.
Pre-v0.21.2 bundled. Missing conditional-blocks syntax, identity resolution chain, variables-only-in-templates footgun warning, Known Quirks mini-section.
